description: The Observatory is the immutable production evidence log. It records every production decision and outcome. It is strictly read-only — it never modifies production behaviour. Its purpose is to enable post-hoc analysis, model improvement, and system auditing.

ADE_EVALUATION.trigger: Every bar where at least one model is evaluated

ARI_DECISION.trigger: Every time ARI receives a Candidate Model

MISSED_OPPORTUNITY.trigger: When a model is eligible but ARI rejects the trade
MISSED_OPPORTUNITY.description: Tracks what would have happened if ARI had approved the trade — enables ARI rule calibration

EXCEPTIONAL_BEHAVIOUR.trigger: When any metric exceeds 2 standard deviations from its rolling mean
EXCEPTIONAL_BEHAVIOUR.description: Flags unusual market conditions or model behaviour for review

CIRCUIT_BREAKER_EVENT.trigger: On every circuit breaker activation or deactivation

access_policy.write: Production system only — no manual writes
access_policy.read: Observatory dashboard, research scripts, post-hoc analysis
access_policy.modification: PROHIBITED — records are immutable once written

dashboard_metrics: Live P&L by model and portfolio
